info.title: WLTR API
info.description:
WLTR exposes a JSON REST API for calibration analytics and laboratory administration.

Base path: `/api`. Most successful responses are `application/json`. Internal-standard summary endpoints also support `text/csv` when you pass `format=csv`.

Authentication: JWT bearer access tokens from `POST /api/Auth/login`; rotate with `POST /api/Auth/refresh`; revoke refresh with `POST /api/Auth/logout`.

Errors: failures return RFC 7807 ProblemDetails (`application/problem+json`) with `title`, `status`, `detail`, and `instance` where applicable.

Pagination: list routes return `{ items, totalCount, page, pageSize }` with optional `sort`. Some routes return bare JSON arrays (for example `GET /api/internal-standards`).

This file is generated for the web client. Drop a backend-exported document at `openapi/wltr.openapi.source.json` (or set `WLTR_OPENAPI_PATH`) before `npm run generate:api-types` to emit fully typed operations instead of this stub.

tags.name: Analytes
tags.description: HTTP API for laboratory-scoped canonical analytes and raw-name aliases.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Authentication, account-recovery, and self-service profile endpoints.

tags.name: Calibration groups
tags.description: HTTP API for calibration groups: draft assembly, readiness, internal-standard summaries, and regression input previews.

tags.name: Calibration levels
tags.description: HTTP API for laboratory-scoped calibration levels (true concentration reference data).

tags.name: Internal standards
tags.description: HTTP API for laboratory-scoped internal standards (catalog CRUD for analyte default IS pickers).

tags.name: Invitations
tags.description: Creates one-time invitations for new users to join a laboratory.

tags.name: Lab technicians
tags.description: HTTP API for lab technician profiles.

tags.name: Laboratories
tags.description: HTTP API for laboratory creation, configuration, and listing.

tags.name: Method configuration
tags.description: HTTP API for laboratory-scoped method configurations and their immutable version snapshots.

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Laboratory-scoped role and permission administration endpoints.

tags.name: Runs
tags.description: HTTP API for calibration run uploads and run metadata/measurement reads.

tags.name: Wltr.Api
tags.description: Host metadata and health-style entry points.

schema.description: Use `csv` (case-insensitive) for UTF-8 CSV; otherwise JSON.
Use `csv` (case-insensitive) for UTF-8 CSV; otherwise JSON.

Bearer.description: Obtain a JWT from POST /api/Auth/login (or refresh via POST /api/Auth/refresh). Send Authorization: Bearer {accessToken}.
